message:
feat(cli): Add --robot-triage flag and --distribute mode for automated work assignment

Extends the CLI with triage output for AI consumption and distribute mode
for automatically assigning prioritized work to idle agents.

Root command (root.go):

1. --robot-triage flag (line 155-161, 1043-1044, 1069-1070)
   - Outputs bv triage analysis as JSON
   - --triage-limit=N: Max recommendations per category (default 10)
   - Example: ntm --robot-triage --triage-limit=20
   - Calls robot.PrintTriage()

2. Error handling improvement (line 782)
   - --robot-bead-show: RobotError outputs JSON to stdout
   - Removes redundant stderr error print

Send command (send.go):

1. --distribute flag (line 225-228, 286-291)
   - Auto-distributes work from bv triage to idle agents
   - Calls runDistributeMode() for orchestration

2. Distribution options (line 365-368)
   - --dist-strategy: balanced (default), speed, quality, dependency
   - --dist-limit: Max tasks to distribute (0 = one per idle agent)
   - --dist-auto: Fully automated without confirmation

3. New imports (line 16, 26, 29)
   - lipgloss for styled output
   - bv for triage integration
   - theme for consistent styling

Config (config.go):
- SessionRecovery settings for spawn integration
- IncludeCMMemories toggle
- AutoInjectOnSpawn toggle

This enables AI agents to:
1. Query prioritized work: ntm --robot-triage
2. Auto-assign to idle agents: ntm send SESSION --distribute
3. Full automation: ntm send SESSION --distribute --dist-auto

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
